channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: MANAWASA Expands Water Infrastructure to Address Regional Demand
item.description: The Masasi Nachingwea Water and Sanitation Authority (MANAWASA) has unveiled plans to expand water infrastructure across four districts in Tanzania’s Mtwara Region, addressing growing demand from popu...

item.title: Ontario Police Warn of Rising Distraction Theft Incidents
item.description: Brockville Police Service and other Ontario agencies are urging residents to remain vigilant after a surge in distraction-style jewelry thefts. Two recent incidents occurred in Brockville, where suspe...

item.title: Twist of Fate achieves 18.6 million views on Kapamilya platforms
item.description: The drama series 'Twist of Fate' has become a major hit on Kapamilya platforms, amassing over 18.6 million views since its release. This achievement highlights the show's popularity among Filipino aud...

item.title: Meta launches Muse Spark 1.1, a new AI coding model competing with OpenAI and Anthropic
item.description: Meta has publicly launched Muse Spark 1.1, a multimodal AI model designed for agentic coding to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic. The model can handle complex workflows, deploy enterprise features, a...

item.title: PepsiCo Faces Sales Decline Amid Inflation and Rising Gas Prices
item.description: PepsiCo, a major food and beverage company, reported a four percent decline in North American beverage sales during the second quarter of 2026 compared to the previous year. The company attributes thi...

item.title: India's Water Policy Shift: Reclaiming Indus Waters for Farmers
item.description: The article discusses Prime Minister Narendra Modi's 'Haq Ka Pani' declaration, which marks a significant shift in India's approach to water diplomacy. Signed in 1960, the Indus Waters Treaty allocate...

item.title: Disciplinary Process Continues for Bellville South High School Murder Case
item.description: A learner at Bellville South High School faces ongoing disciplinary action after allegedly killing a fellow student in June 2026. The incident, which occurred during an argument over a stolen cellphon...

item.title: Kaduna Road Projects Boost Infrastructure and Community Development

item.title: Tanzania's Water Sector Focuses on Enhancing Public Engagement and Communication
item.description: Officials from Tanzania's water sector convened in Dar es Salaam for a strategic meeting to address challenges in public communication and community engagement. The gathering aimed to strengthen colla...

item.title: Colorado GOP Primary: Candidate with Controversial Past Wins Gubernatorial Race
item.description: Victor Marx, a Republican gubernatorial candidate in Colorado, won the GOP primary after a contentious race against state Sen. Barbara Kirkmeyer. Marx, known for his extreme claims about his past, inc...

item.title: Australians cut home heating to save on energy costs
item.description: More than half of Australians are reducing their use of home heating during winter to avoid steep electricity bills, according to a recent report. The trend highlights growing concerns about rising po...

item.title: Long Sitting Hours Linked to Higher Cancer Risk Despite Regular Exercise
item.description: A recent study highlights the dangers of prolonged sitting, even for individuals who engage in regular physical activity. The research emphasizes that sedentary behavior, such as long hours at a desk ...

item.title: iWant Launches 2026 with Affordable Annual Plans Starting at P299
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios' iWant platform launched a significant promotional campaign for 2026, offering discounted annual subscription plans that provide year-long access to its content starting at just P299. ...

item.title: Fox News Criticizes JD Vance's Iran Negotiations, Calls for New Team

item.title: California real estate agent faces probation and fines after price gouging fire victims
item.description: A Southern California real estate agent, Mike Kobeissi, has been sentenced to 12 months of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a mandatory ethics course following an investigation into his ...

item.title: Telstra Outage Highlights Ongoing Vulnerabilities in Critical Infrastructure
item.description: The recent Telstra outage has reignited concerns about the reliability of vital infrastructure in Australia, just 10 months after the Optus disaster that disrupted emergency services. The incident, wh...

item.title: US and Iran Escalate Conflict with New Strikes on Hormuz Strait
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran has intensified with renewed military strikes targeting each other's assets in the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz. US forces launched airs...

item.title: Hayley Wickenheiser leaves Toronto Maple Leafs after eight seasons
item.description: Hayley Wickenheiser, a hockey legend with a storied playing career, has parted ways with the Toronto Maple Leafs after eight seasons in the team's front office. The decision came after discussions wit...

item.title: ITV relocates World Cup studio indoors due to severe weather disruption in New York
item.description: ITV's World Cup coverage team was forced to abandon their New York studio during France's quarter-final clash with Morocco due to severe storms. The studio, located in Brooklyn, was evacuated as heavy...
